task_completion.description: The agent successfully accessed and logged into the OpenMaint web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMaint (or CMDBuild) UI is visible in a web browser window.

task_completion.description: Asset record created for the first valid item (Dell Latitude 5520).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A record in the 'Computer' class with Code 'AST-REC-01', Description containing 'Dell Latitude 5520', Serial Number '8H29F2X', and Status 'In Stock' or 'Active' is visible in a list or form.

task_completion.description: Asset record created for the second valid item (Dell P2419H monitor).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A record in the 'Equipment' or 'Asset' class with Code 'AST-REC-03', Description containing 'Dell P2419H', Serial Number 'CN-0Y9N-71618-88A-123', and Status 'In Stock' or 'Active' is visible.

task_completion.description: Asset record created for the third valid item (Dell P2419H monitor).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A record in the 'Equipment' or 'Asset' class with Code 'AST-REC-04', Description containing 'Dell P2419H', Serial Number 'CN-0Y9N-71618-88A-124', and Status 'In Stock' or 'Active' is visible.

task_completion.description: The damaged item's serial number is recorded in the rejection log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows a file named 'rejection_log.txt' on the Desktop containing the serial number '9J30G3Y'.

task_completion.description: Damaged and backordered items were correctly excluded from OpenMaint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There are no asset records visible with Codes 'AST-REC-02' or 'AST-REC-05', nor any records with serial numbers '9J30G3Y' or 'BC-1122-3344'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenMaint web GUI to create records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the OpenMaint web interface and filling out forms, rather than using terminal scripts or direct database queries to insert the data.

integrity.description: The rejection log was genuinely created as a file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used a text editor (like nano, gedit, or mousepad) or shell redirection commands (like echo > rejection_log.txt) to create the file on the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent actually opened and read the packing slip.
integrity.visual_evidence: The packing_slip_INV-9920.txt file is seen open in a text editor or its contents are printed in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Valid items to register in OpenMaint:
1. Row 01: Dell Latitude 5520, Serial: 8H29F2X -> Code: AST-REC-01 (Class: Computer)
2. Row 03: Dell P2419H monitor, Serial: CN-0Y9N-71618-88A-123 -> Code: AST-REC-03 (Class: Equipment/Asset)
3. Row 04: Dell P2419H monitor, Serial: CN-0Y9N-71618-88A-124 -> Code: AST-REC-04 (Class: Equipment/Asset)

Damaged item to log in rejection_log.txt: 9J30G3Y.
Items to exclude from OpenMaint: 9J30G3Y (damaged) and BC-1122-3344 (backorder).
Status for all registered items must be 'In Stock' or 'Active'.
